feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: HelloI need some help in Aggregating rows where i am getting cumulative aggregation
entry.content:
Hello

 

I need some help in Aggregating rows where i am getting cumulative aggregation per position groups. Foe example if i have 4 rows of values to aggregated and its position as 3 then its adding all the rows and assigning the value then again adding the result with the 2nd , 3rd, and 4th row and again the results with 3rd and 4th and again with the 4th , its aggregating as much as row of the position.

*if lv_cityp is not initial and lv_vusta = 'started'.
*  read table lt_filtered assigning <ls_filtered> with key zxxmewait = lv_wait.
*  if sy-subrc = 0.
*    <ls_filtered>-duration = <ls_filtered>-duration + lv_dur.
*
*    else.
*      ls_filtered-zxxmewait = lv_wait.
*      ls_filtered-duration = lv_dur.
*      insert ls_filtered into table lt_filtered.
*      endif.  if anyone can help with that it would be really great. Thanks

entry.title: BP is not creating with respect to new customer creation
entry.content:
I used the class CMD_EI_API and the method MAINTAIN_DIRECT_INPUT to pass customer data into the deep structure. It successfully updated the customer in table KNA1, but the Business Partner (BP) was not created. I checked the BP records and confirmed it wasn’t generated. Please let me know how to resolve this

   CALL METHOD cmd_ei_api=>maintain_direct_input
      EXPORTING
        iv_collect_messages  = gc_x
        is_master_data       = ls_customer
      IMPORTING
        es_message_defective = ls_error.

entry.title: Direct API call from SAP S/4 HANA public cloud to third party cloud system without Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are working on requirement to integrate SAP and non-SAP system. We have SAP S/4 HANA public cloud edition through which we need to do API call (GET/POST), provided by third party cloud system. I understand we can achieve same with SAP 'Integration suite service' (hosted on SAP BTP account) but in our case it is not an option to do so.

We are looking to do Direct API call ( like how can we do on ECC or S/4 on premise system, by using SM59 HTTP connection and using cl_http* class) .

But can we achieve same with SAP S/4 HANA public cloud edition without any integration (middleware) system?

It would be very helpful if someone has any insights regarding this.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: ABAP Extensibility tutorial : Create a Shopping Cart Business Object
entry.content:
Been following Tutorial Create a Shopping Cart Business Object

This should create a simple UI for the cart in our 3-tier SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.  This is done via Eclipse IDE and is connected to our SAP S/4 Development client.  This has nothing at all to do with BTP ABAP (we don't even have that installed)

I can create the Table in the Eclipse IDE.  I know the Table now exists in SAP S/4 (as I wrote a simple OO ABAP class running in console to check ! ).

But the on Right-click the created database table to Generate ABAP Repository Objects is not going to Generate any object .  Why so !?.

Generate ABAP Repository Objects.Does not Generate anythingat least I know my DB Table exists

entry.title: Is there any way to use se38 report in SAP public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Scenario: I'm using sflight table but its delivered empty record. So, sap help portal suggesting use SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR report. problem is SAP public cloud is not allowing to execute reports (SE38). is there any way to use SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR?

Regards,

Nirojan.

entry.title: Clean core in PP-DS and AATP in S/4HANA PCE: how much is possible?
entry.content:
Hi, I am seeking for some guidance in clean core for PP-DS and AATP in S/4HANA PCE. I was triggered by this blog on EWM and clean core. And was wondering if there are similar considerations for AATP and PPDS in S/4HANA PCE?

It is about the following:

My customer is doing the brownfield conversion from ECC to S/4 RISE with doing "greenfield" PP-DS and AATP in their S/4, moving away from APO. However, they did a lot of developments (140 objects touched and specific heuristics created). Most of them, they are taking them over in S/4 and doing the code remediation. How can we do the code remediation as best possible according to clean core principles? And how much is possible in the areas of PP-DS and AATP (referring to what EWM can only do)

Many thanks for your feedback, 

Kind regards, 

Goedele

entry.title: Public cloud HR master data of userid and pernr (person number (PA0105))
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to fetch the data from PA0105(HR master data) table in public cloud tenant. I need pernr and userid fields. I tried with custom cds view it's not working, is there any way to call the PA0105 / any standard APIs/ services? 

I checked Overview | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub I couldn't be able to find anything related to HR Master.

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: Getting error in Eclipse ADT "Business Catalog is not supported in the selected project"
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on an SAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming Model) application in Eclipse ADT. I need to schedule Background Job. While trying to create a Business Catalog using the context menu (New > Other Repository Object > Business Catalog), I get the following error:

"Business Catalog is not supported in the selected project"

I am not sure why this is happening, as I expected to add a catalog and create/assign Role to get Job template in Application Job screen. 

What I’ve Done:

  • Using Eclipse ADT (latest version) connected to an on-premise S/4HANA system.

  • I have created Application Job object and added sub object,  then created a class and created Application Job Catalog Entries and assigned class to it and then created Application Job Template (save and activated all).
  • I am unable to see custom template which I created in Application Job tile.
  • Upon further investigation, I got to know that we need to setup Authorizations for that I need to create Business catalog and Role for Authorization.
  • Right clicked on package and clicked on ABAP repository object but unable to find Business catalog. Then I selected my DEV system client from Eclipse, right clicked on it New ->other ->cloud Identity and access management ->Double clicked on Business Catalog, getting above error.

Question:

  • Why am I getting this error?

  • Is there a specific project type or system requirement for creating Business Catalogs in Eclipse ADT?

  • Do I need to configure something in the backend to enable this functionality?

Any help or guidance would be much appreciated!

Thanks,
Akbar Hussain

entry.title: Create custom entity with compositions exposed as OData V4 API
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I have a question which I am not able to solve by myself ^^

My requirement basically is to create a new custom API in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud that allows me, for a given {warehouse + batch-managed product + quantity}, to find the list of all batch numbers, that can be consumed to address that batch-managed product's quantity based on some rules.

I gave myself as objective to create this structure as output of my new custom API, with a header structure (giving the status of the batch determination logic) and an item list (giving the list of all the batch numbers that should be used for the consumption, with the quantity to be consumed in each batch):

I started by created 2 custom CDS entities: one for the header structure and another one for the item structure.

I added this annotation to both these 2 custom CDS entities "@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy:'ABAP:ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1'" where "ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1'" is a custom class referencing interface "IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER" In order to be able to trigger its method "SELECT" when someone tries to retrieve data from either one of my 2 custom CDS entities. 

In order to have a parent-child relationship between my 2 custom CDS entities, I added a composition statement in the header custom entity CDS view and an association to parent statement in the line-items child custom entity CDS view.

Custom Entity for the Header parent CDS view:

Custom Entity for the Line-Item Child CDS view:

Then I implemented code for the SELECT statement of my custom class ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1.

Once done, I created a new service definition exposing both my 2 custom cds entities:

Then I exposed my service definition into an OData V4 API service binding, followed with the normal communication scenario, comm arrangement configuration..

My problem is that, once all this is done, when I try to execute my API from POSTMAN, I am not able to get the header AND the item data AT THE SAME TIME.

I am able for instance to get data for the header custom entity CDS view with the correct structure I defined: 

I am also able to get data for the line_item custom entity CDS view, for the different batch numbers to use for the consumption as per the structure I designed:

But, How can I merge these two results of these 2 entities in the same response?

I want my custom API response to be similar to the following one: 

How can I accomplish this please?

I thought by creating a composition relationship between these 2 custom entities, that the SELECT method will fetch data for both header and Item custom entity CDS views and that the result will be merged in the same response, but it is not.

Also, when I run a GET OData call to the header entity, "SELECT" method of class "ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET0" is called only once, and "io_request->get_entity_id( )" gives "ZC_TEST_BATCH_DETERMIN_HD" as entity. This means, that my logic is being executed ONLY on the header custom CDS view, which is not enough to fulfill my requirement.

Then I tried to add "$expand" to the OData URL to execute, by adding "?$expand=_BatchDetItemDetails" to my URL:

but I am getting HTTP Bad Request error in POSTMAN : "

"The expand option's expand path contains an invalid property '_BatchDetItemDetails'",

Can someone help me on this please? I feel like my custom API is not designed to "accept" any "expand" attribute. 

Or if you have another idea on how to achieve this, without having to use the "?$expand" statement?

PS: the metadata of this custom API is attached to the present message

Thanks experts

entry.title: BAPI to read table CRMS4D_EXT_REF in SAP S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am storing external reference of Service Contract in table CRMS4D_EXT_REF in field in SAP S/4 HANA. I need to read corresponding SAP service contract number in ABAP report.

If I pass external reference to field REFERENCE_NUMBER of table  CRMS4D_EXT_REF ,  field OBJECT_ID can give me SAP service contract number. Is there any BAPI or way to read the table contents in ABAP report. I don't want to use select query.

Thanks in advance,

Gayatri

entry.title: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ( ABAP CLOUD )
entry.content:
Hello Experts

How can I consume a standard event of the Behavior Definition finance object “R_JOURNALENTRYTP” locally in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - In-App Developer Extensibility system ?

Or how you could detect the create or modify events of a financial accounting entry. To run an abap cloud development in parallel or by background job ?. Such a process contains commits and updates other objects.

Currently, in the Custom Logic App I have not been able to find a BADI that meets my requirement and allows me to run an abap development in parallel at the time of a creation or modification of an accounting entry.

Please support

Best regards,Antony Pantoja

entry.title: SAP RAP Events local Consumption
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am seeing a weird issue with local event consumption of standard RAP events. So, I have seen if we create Purchase order from ME21N SAP GUI, standard RAP BO event Created of R_PurchaseOrderTP is triggered. Once, I implemented the local handler for this entity event, it doesn't trigger immediately. But once I go inside debugging mode, it starts triggering. 

 

Have anyone else faced this issue? Do we have to activate or run any program for this?

entry.title: RAP on Dynamic Condition Tables – Draft Enablement Challenge
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working on a requirement where the underlying tables are dynamic (condition tables). I need to build a RAP application on top of this setup. However, I'm facing a challenge: I can't enable draft functionality because the CDS view is a query implemented by a class, and draft is not supported in this scenario.

Draft functionality is crucial for my use case. Does anyone have experience with a similar setup or suggestions on how to handle this? Any ideas on enabling draft or dynamically handling such data in a RAP application would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: sap public cloud BADI needed for VF02 release to accounting
entry.content:
Hi Guys, 

I looking for BAdi's for VF01 or VF02 during Acc document creation or release to accounting in SAP public cloud platform .

I tried the following BAdi but these are not triggering

FCI_BADI_INVOICING~FKK_EVENT_2612

ES_SD_BIL_EXTEND~SD_BIL_APM_SET_APP_REASON

FCI_BADI_BILLINGREQUEST~FKK_EVENT_8300

FKK_BADI_SD~FKK_EVENT_4040

the goal is to add the billing document details into a custom table when they proceed to create accounting document number.

please share your input as i am struck with this for almost 3 days.

entry.title: How to restrict Keyboard shortcuts using screen persona script in SAP public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Is there a way to restrict certain keyboard shortcuts using screen personas, as it is overriding my current script logic and saving the screen thereby generating goods movement document. Otherwise, is it possible to restrict them in ABAP environment by adding a custom logic

I want to restrict Control + Save and Fn + F3. I am able to record session for these in CO11N Transaction as below:

session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey(11);


session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey(3);

How to restrict or suppress this action?  Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Production Order Quantity Update Issue in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

We are currently working on a custom development in  SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud  using  ABAP RAP model.

Requirement:
We need to update the  Total Quantity  in the Production Order (see screenshot 2), using the value from the  Total Weight  field in our custom RAP screen (screenshot 1).

📎 Attached Screenshots:
- Screenshot 1: RAP Custom Screen (shows Total Weight = 140.000)
- Screenshot 2: Production Order screen (where we want to update the quantity)

What We Tried:
We are using this CDS view:  I_ProductionOrdConfirmationTP
2. Entity:  ProductionOrderConfirmation
3. Field: ConfirmationYieldQuantity

We are triggering the confirmation logic, but the quantity does not reflect in the production order.

Expected Behavior:**
Total Weight (e.g., 140.000) should be passed to the  Total Qty  in the production order after confirmation.

Issue:
Though confirmation is working, the quantity is  not updated  in the standard production order.

Questions:
1. Are we using the right CDS and field?
2. Do we need to use a different service or BAPI for this update in the Public Cloud?
3. Any additional steps to reflect changes in the standard order screen?

Any help is appreciated!

Thanks!

entry.title: S/4 HANA Private Cloud Extensibility - Manage Reservation Items
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am looking to extend the standard SAP FIORI App - Manage Reservation Items. Specifically, I would like to add a new filter based on the MARC table (Custom Z field) to filter items records  and a button for goods movement. I would greatly appreciate your suggestions on how to approach this while adhering to the clean core methodology.

Do I need to extend App using Custom Fields App or directly extending the underlying CDS View.

Thank you very much for your assistance.

Best regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: How to Use Standard SAP Tables (BKPF, BSEG) in CDS Views with ABAP Cloud Programming on SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently learning SAP BTP and working with SAP ABAP Cloud Programming for the first time in Eclipse. While creating a CDS View, I noticed that I couldn’t use standard SAP tables like BKPF or BSEG directly in the CDS View.

During my research on how to use standard SAP tables in ABAP Cloud Programming, I found that these tables need to be released first before they can be used in the cloud environment.

Could someone please explain how to release these tables for use in the cloud? Or is there another recommended way to access standard table data in SAP BTP / ABAP Cloud?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: BRF+ S4/HANA 2025 BADI code ABAP for key users
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I'm implementing the SD_APM_SET_APPROVAL_REASON badi.

When implementing the badi, it tells me that the ABAP model for key users should be used.

For this badi, a BRF was implemented as the decision-making model.

My issue is that when I try to execute the BRF within the badi, I get the following message:

The use of Class CL_FDT_FUNCTION_PROCESS is not permitted.

I've searched some forums, but they refer to the CL_FDT_FUNCTION_PROCESS_API.

But it doesn't exist on my system.

I've also tried generating a class that inherits from CL_FDT_FUNCTION_PROCESS, but it's defined as final, so I can't inherit its properties.

Is there any other way to run the BRF from the ABAP code for key users?

entry.title: How to restore task standard TS00008267 SAP Workflow
entry.content:
I'm creating a WF project. Part of the development process is creating a decision task, and I accidentally edited standard task 8267 and didn't create a Z.
I only added two new fields and modified the message. I haven't yet transferred the change to quality.
Do you know if it's possible to restore the task or how can I fix this problem? Thank you.

DEV: Changed.

 

QAS: ORIGINAL
